evidence: Repo exposes documentation and validators but no orchestration runtime.
gap_subset.impact: The system cannot execute recursive architecture evolution as a program.
gap_subset.title: Missing executable coordination kernel

evidence: No canonical state store existed under the legacy external runtime/state path.
No per-swarm CSSM isolation surfaces existed for Alpha/Beta/Gamma.
gap_subset.impact: Agents cannot reason against versioned architecture state or compare futures.
gap_subset.title: No canonical CSSM snapshots or isolated swarm state

evidence: The repo had durable invention history but no machine-readable ACR.
No executable task dependency graph or proposal registry existed.
gap_subset.impact: Capability-aware assignment and proposal-driven execution were impossible.
gap_subset.title: No agent capability registry, proposal registry, or task graph runtime

evidence: No legacy external runtime/logs directory existed.
No recovery manifest or deterministic resume source existed.
gap_subset.impact: The system could not be observed, audited, or resumed after interruption.
gap_subset.title: No telemetry or recovery control plane
